content: > hey—before you head to the carolinas: i’ve built a performance system (70+ pgs docs, working prototype, full infrastructure) but haven’t released anything. i need a narrative co-architect for 4–6 months to validate, shape, and create the dramaturgical framework that will guide all future writers. compensation $16–20K once we land funding ($75–115K likely). bootstrap now, retroactive payment + equity in what we create. 45-min call when you’re back?
context: From document: Invitation to Collaborate: Omni-Dromenon-Engine Narrative Co-Architecture — chunk 5 (chunk 5/5)
